summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, or security-routing actions are recommended from the hydrated state. Validator-reported security failures for #94538 and #94312 are not safely repairable as route_security because the hydrated preflight items explicitly have security_sensitive:false; those two actions are downgraded to item-scoped needs_human for security-boundary adjudication.
